svg.title: DevTrack V2 Monorepo Structure
svg.desc: Turborepo monorepo with apps (web, api, workers), packages (database, types, config, ui, ai-client, logger), infra, and docs layers
svg.text: Build order: packages/config → packages/database → packages/types → packages/ai-client → api → workers → web
Cache: all lint, typecheck, and build outputs cached by content hash. CI is ~80% faster after first run.
pnpm workspaces: each app installs only its own deps. No hoisting surprises.
